summary: Iteration 12 admin bulk-delete of store_receipts fully verified. Backend: 8/8 new iter12 tests + 132/132 full regression (after reseed). Frontend Playwright: RBAC visibility (store01 hidden, susanto visible), select→bulk-bar→dialog→cancel-preserves-selection, and confirm→toast→row-removal all pass.
critical_code_review_comments: bulk_delete_receipts: force=true wipes even fully-consumed receipts, breaking FIFO history for issuance rows that already reference receipt_id. Consider soft-delete flag or block if any store_issuances.allocations.receipt_id points to it. (Currently allocations only store denormalized snapshot, so historical reports are safe, but issuance→receipt drill-down would 404.)
Endpoint returns 404 only when NO ids match; a mixed batch (some valid, some unknown) silently deletes valid ones with no warning. Consider returning {deleted, missing_ids:[...]} for transparency.
Frontend: after successful delete, load() is called but selection is already cleared; if load() fails the toast success is misleading. Minor.
Frontend: 'ig-select-all' select-all only spans the current page (rows state), which is fine because page_size=500, but if pagination is added later this becomes surprising.
Audit log for bulk_delete_receipts stores '-' as resource_id (batch op); consider logging the ids array in the meta for forensic trace.
seed_data_creation: Re-ran /app/backend/seed_data.py once mid-run to restore consumed transactions (needed by pre-existing test_list_seeded / TestMultiCurrency / test_store_pending_list assertions). Created & cleaned up UI_TEST_VENDOR_0..2 receipts for Playwright.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend iter12 test file uses session cookies. Full regression (132 tests) is stable but seed data (8 transactions, 4 SOs) gets consumed by CRUD/delete tests — re-run /app/backend/seed_data.py before running backend_test.py::TestTransactions and TestMultiCurrency. bulk-delete endpoint expects POST /api/store/receipts/bulk-delete with body {ids:[...], force?:bool}; require_admin (not super_admin) — both susanto & erwin pass.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — implementation matches spec. Only friction: (a) initial pytest run showed 3 pre-existing regression failures caused by consumed seed data (test_list_seeded expected >=8 transactions, TestMultiCurrency expected SGD seed, TestStoreRole expected pending list) — all pass after re-seed. (b) UI test needed to seed 3 UI_TEST_VENDOR receipts up-front because the incoming-report was empty in the shared preview DB.
